content.en:
"The sixth half-step Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed!"

After Ye Tian slashed another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm demon seed, he muttered.

Moreover, not long ago, another demon seed abyss was born, and it seems to be even more attractive.

According to this frequency, there will definitely be more half-step Eternal Realm God Realm demon seeds in the future.

At this moment, he suddenly understood a truth.

Why are there not many eternal kingdoms in the Eternal Kingdoms Alliance, many of them are dozens of eternal kingdoms, why don't they merge?

For example, the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods and the Alliance of the Thousand Mountains Kingdom, the two Kingdom Alliances are not too far apart.

And the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance was opened up later, so why didn't the pioneers of the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance come to the side of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance in the first place, wouldn't it be better?

Before, he thought that it was these Eternal Kingdom Alliances that wanted to develop on their own, but now he felt that it should not be the reason.

"Maybe there are a lot of Eternal Dao Realms who have done this, uniting with each other to make the number of Eternal Realms of the Eternal Realm Alliance more and more, and something has happened!" Ye Tian muttered.

It is precisely for this reason that those Eternal Kingdom Alliances must ensure that the Eternal Kingdom Alliance remains at a certain number before their own strength reaches a certain level.

This is also the reason why after the collapse of the Agu Kingdom, the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods did not blame him.

Because that's a good thing for the Alliance of the Gods!

The point is, no one ever told him about it.

Of course, Ye Tian had never understood about this matter.

After all, who would open up so many eternal kingdoms at once, no one could have predicted this situation.

"The current situation is not too bad, my strength has improved rapidly, and in a short period of time, it should not be possible for a demon seed creature of the Eternal Realm God Realm to appear. In the Eternal Realm, there are definitely not many demon seeds in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and almost all of them have been attracted by the Demon Seed Abyss, and they will not come to me again. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The years passed.

While Ye Tian was cultivating, he was guarding against the demon seeds around the Endless Realm Alliance, and the number of demon seeds was relatively large at the beginning, but then there were fewer of them.

It should be a lot of attracted demon seeds, and it takes time to travel halfway, after all, the nearby demon seeds have been eliminated, and the demon seeds in other places can't appear out of thin air!

......

Three billion years after the Dao Era.

this day.

An incomparably terrifying demon seed hurried to the Endless Realm, and the aura of its body had surpassed that of the Demon Seed Abyss, which was much stronger than the Demon Seed Abyss, comparable to the strength of the Xuanze Realm God.

"Demon Seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He didn't expect that it would really attract such a demon seed.

Ye Tian didn't want to put the battlefield in the Endless Realm Alliance, so he directly entered the Land of Death to intercept this demon seed.

"A half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm dares to intercept the deity!"

The demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm said coldly.

The demon seed has spiritual wisdom in the abyss, and it is normal for the demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm to have spiritual intelligence.

Ye Tian said, "Why does Your Excellency have to come here?"

"Attract!" said the Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed.

"You can go to the Demon Seed Abyss of other Eternal Realms, there's no need to come to us, right?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Hahaha, it seems that you really don't understand, this is a large Eternal Realm Alliance, the special aura of the Demon Seed Abyss helps me improve my strength, and I can absorb more of the Origin Breath. The Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seed said, "So, I won't give up here." It seems that there are no strong people in your Eternal Realm Alliance, it seems that there is not even an Eternal Realm God Realm, this is simply my paradise!"

As he spoke, this Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed killed Ye Tian.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian took the Eternal Demon Pillar in his hand and made a move.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's current strength is even stronger than that of the Xuanze Realm God, and the strength he exerts with the Eternal Demon Pillar is naturally even stronger.

"What, you actually obtained the Eternal Pillar!!!"

This Eternal Realm Demon Seed showed a look of greed.

The Eternal Demon Pillar will be born in the Demon Seed Abyss, but the probability is very low, the Eternal Demon Pillar is of little help to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and the Eternal Realm God Realm does not even dare to touch the Eternal Demon Pillar, and only demons like them are eager to obtain the Eternal Demon Pillar.

However, he had been to many demon seed abysses, and he had never encountered the Eternal Demon Pillar at all, only heard of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Unexpectedly, in such a place, I actually encountered the Eternal Demon Pillar.

"The Eternal Pillar is my !!"

As if its sanity had been devoured, this demon seed did not realize that its strength was not enough to snatch the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Thundered!!!!!

He frantically attacked Ye Tian in an attempt to seize the Eternal Demon Pillar.

However.

With a single blow, his body was knocked into the air.

That is, the strength of the demon seed's body far exceeded that of the Eternal Realm God Realm, otherwise this blow just now would have been enough to severely damage him.

However, under the attack again and again, the demon seed's injuries became more and more serious.

In the event of his extremely serious injuries, he wanted to escape.

But Ye Tian's other copy bodies appeared, intercepted him, restrained him here, and then attacked again and again with the Eternal Demon Pillar.

In a few moments, the demon seed was about to fall.

"Tell me, why did the Eternal Kingdom Alliance give birth to the Demon Seed Abyss, and why the more Eternal Kingdoms there are, the more they attract you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"If I did, you wouldn't let me go?"

The Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Okay, then I'll say!" The Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed said, "Actually, all the Demon Seed Abysses are just projections, and the real Demon Seed Abyss (promised) is the heaven and earth comparable to the Realm God Realm. And the greater the number of Eternal Realms in the Eternal Kingdom Alliance, it will attract the origin of the Demon Seed Abyss to come, form a Demon Seed Abyss projection, and attract the surrounding Demon Seeds, which is also to limit the development of the Eternal Realm, and to make more Eternal Dao Realms fall into the ranks of Demon Seeds. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

"Why can the Eternal Kingdom Alliance not attract demon seeds?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"I don't know!" said the Eternal Realm Demon Seed with a shake of his head.

"I really don't know?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

This Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seed thought about it for a while, and hurriedly said: "It is said that with a large number of Eternal National Decrees to open up the Eternal Kingdom in the Demon Seed Abyss, you can use the origin of the Eternal Kingdom Boundary to confront the Demon Seed Abyss, so as to break the projection, so that you will not be targeted by the Demon Seed Abyss, but this is just a guess, and I don't know if it will succeed." "。
